objective.detail: Boot the west relay and expose the next lane. Terminal 1 of 3.

boss.detail: Relay Warden online. Beam grid armed.

extract.detail: Hold inside the beacon to upload the relay chain and leave.

objective.detail: Stabilize the west uplink to reopen the center lane. Stay inside the ring until the uplink stabilizes. Zone 1 of 2.

boss.detail: Uplink Overseer deployed. Siege battery live.

extract.detail: Collapse back to mid and hold for pickup.

objective.detail: Trip the reactor. The evac clock starts immediately.

boss.detail: Blackout Hunter inbound. Rail line charging.

extract.detail: Sprint back to evac and hold before the collapse catches you.
